Appointment.exe

How to run:
1. Double-click Appointment.exe.
2. The local web app will open automatically in your default browser at http://127.0.0.1:8000.
3. If the browser does not open automatically, open that URL manually.
4. Close the terminal window or press CTRL+C in the terminal to stop the app.

Notes:
- The app stores data in appointments.db in the same folder as the executable.
- This package was created with a fresh database; the old appointments.db was purged.
